steps.title: Distribute the factor
steps.content:
Multiply $18$ by each term inside the parentheses:
$$18(x^2-6)=18x^2-18(6)$$

steps.title: Simplify the constant term
steps.content:
Compute the constant term:
$$18(6)=108$$
So the equivalent expression is
$$18x^2-108$$

steps.title: Check against the choices
steps.content: Choice B has constant $-24$, Choice C has constant $-6$, and Choice D adds $12$. The expression $18x^2-108$ matches the distributed form. The answer is A.
